content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 06:23 CDT] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: [INTERACTIVE TABLE TASK] Build competitive comparison table with filters and sorting.

**DELIVERABLE:**
Save to: ~/data/phase4/tech-assets/competitive-comparison.html

**REQUIREMENTS:**
- Compare "Our Product" vs 3 competitors (Competitor A, B, C) - 4 columns total
- Minimum 8 feature rows with checkmarks (✓) and X marks (✗)
- Interactive filters: buttons for "Show All" / "Our Wins" / "Feature Comparison"
- Sortable columns: click column header to sort rows
- Highlight row on hover
- Responsive design: horizontal scroll container for mobile
- Clean, professional styling (modern dark or light theme)
- Single HTML file with embedded CSS and vanilla JavaScript

**FEATURE IDEAS** (pick 8+ relevant ones):
- Real-time Collaboration
- API Access / REST API
- SSO/SAML Support
- Custom Branding
- Audit Logging
- Mobile App
- 24/7 Support
- On-premise Deployment
- Role-based Permissions
- Webhook Support

**DATA:** "Our Product" should win on 4-5 key differentiators vs competitors.

**BONUS:** Smooth CSS transitions, sticky header on scroll, export/copy functionality.

Return the full file path when complete.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to build a competitive comparison table with interactive filters and sorting. I need to:

1. Create an HTML file that compares "Our Product" vs 3 competitors (A, B, C)
2. Include 4 columns total
3. Have at least 8 feature rows with checkmarks (✓) and X marks (✗)
4. Add interactive filters: "Show All", "Our Wins", "Feature Comparison"
5. Make columns sortable by clicking headers
6. Highlight rows on hover
7. Responsive design with horizontal scroll for mobile
8. Clean, professional styling (modern dark theme)
9. Single HTML file with embedded CSS and vanilla JavaScript
10. Save to: ~/data/phase4/tech-assets/competitive-comparison.html

Features to include:
- Real-time Collaboration
- API Access / REST API
- SSO/SAML Support
- Custom Branding
- Audit Logging
- Mobile App
- 24/7 Support
- On-premise Deployment
- Role-based Permissions
- Webhook Support

"Our Product" should win on 4-5 key differentiators vs competitors.

Bonus features:
- Smooth CSS transitions
- Sticky header on scroll
- Export/copy functionality

Let me write this

content.text: I'll build the interactive competitive comparison table for you. Let me create a professional

arguments.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Competitive Comparison - Our Product vs Competitors</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-primary: #1a1a2e;
            --bg-secondary: #16213e;
            --bg-tertiary: #0f3460;
            --accent-primary: #e94560;
            --accent-secondary: #ff6b6b;
            --text-primary: #eaeaea;
            --text-secondary: #b8b8b8;
            --success: #00d9ff;
            --danger: #ff4757;
            --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            --transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-primary) 0%, var(--bg-secondary) 100%);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding: 2rem 1rem;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        header {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--success) 0%, var(--accent-primary) 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .subtitle {
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }

        .controls {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 1rem;
            justify-content: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .filter-group {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
            border: 2px solid var(--bg-tertiary);
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        .btn:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent-primary);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--shadow);
        }

        .btn.active {
            background: var(--accent-primary);
            border-color: var(--accent-primary);
        }

        .btn-export {
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            border-color: var(--success);
            color: var(--success);
        }

        .btn-export:hover {
            background: var(--success);
            color: var(--bg-primary);
        }

        .table-wrapper {
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px var(--shadow);
            overflow-x: auto;
            -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        }

        table {
            width: 100%;
            min-width: 600px;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            table-layout: fixed;
        }

        thead {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        th {
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            padding: 1.2rem 1rem;
            text-align: left;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            transition: var(--transition);
            position: relative;
        }

        th:first-child {
            width: 35%;
        }

        th:not(:first-child) {
            width: 21.67%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        th:hover {
            background: var(--accent-primary);
        }

        th .sort-icon {
            display: inline-block;
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
            opacity: 0.5;
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        th.sort-asc .sort-icon::after {
            content: '▲';
            opacity: 1;
        }

        th.sort-desc .sort-icon::after {
            content: '▼';
            opacity: 1;
        }

        th .sort-icon::after {
            content: '⇅';
        }

        td {
            padding: 1rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bg-tertiary);
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        tbody tr {
            transition: var(--transition);
        }

        tbody tr:hover {
            background: rgba(233, 69, 96, 0.08);
            transform: scale(1.01);
        }

        tbody tr:hover td {
            border-bottom-color: var(--accent-primary);
        }

        .feature-name {
            font-weight: 500;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .feature-icon {
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .check {
            color: var(--success);
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.5);
        }

        .cross {
            color: var(--danger);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        td:not(:first-child) {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .our-product {
            background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.05);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .our-product-header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-tertiary) 0%, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2) 100%);
            color: var(--success);
        }

        .our-product-header:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-primary) 0%, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3) 100%);
        }

        .competitor-a { color: #ffa502; }
        .competitor-b { color: #7bed9f; }
        .competitor-c { color: #ff6b81; }

        tr.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .row-win {
            background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.08);
        }

        .toast {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 2rem;
            right: 2rem;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px var(--shadow);
            transform: translateY(100px);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: var(--transition);
            z-index: 1000;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .toast.show {
            transform: translateY(0);
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .toast-icon {
            color: var(--success);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            h1 {
                font-size: 1.8rem;
            }

            .table-wrapper {
                border-radius: 12px;
            }

            th, td {
                padding: 0.8rem 0.6rem;
                font-size: 0.9rem;
            }

            .feature-icon {
